articles.title: NatWest Group expands free investment-focused financial guidance programme
articles.desc: NatWest Group is expanding its investment-focused Financial Foundations programme to 50,000 people in UK workplaces and community groups.

articles.title: Tether launches stablecoin wallet
articles.desc: Tether launched a stablecoin wallet on Tuesday, allowing users to transfer digital dollars, tokenised gold, and bitcoin across multiple blockchains.

articles.title: FCA and Turing Institute develop synthetic dataset to combat money laundering
articles.desc: The UK Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) has developed synthetic dataset in a project to foster innovation in money laundering detection.
